## Summary

Describe the change and the analytical or engineering problem it addresses.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New visualisation or analytical feature
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test or CI improvement
- [ ] Refactor with no intended behaviour change

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest --cov=dataviz_reference --cov-report=term-missing`
- [ ] Relevant examples or dashboards were run locally
- [ ] New or changed visual output was reviewed for clarity and accessibility

## Visualisation quality

- [ ] The chart answers a clear analytical question
- [ ] Labels, titles, scales, legends, and tooltips are meaningful
- [ ] Colours and contrast are accessible
- [ ] Large datasets are aggregated where appropriate
- [ ] Examples are deterministic and do not include sensitive data

## Screenshots or outputs

Add before-and-after screenshots or generated output paths when the change affects rendering.

## Additional notes

Document compatibility, performance, or follow-up considerations here.
